scripts.install:all: npm --prefix backend install && npm --prefix frontend install
scripts.dev: npm run clean:ports && concurrently --kill-others-on-fail --names BACKEND,FRONTEND "npm --prefix backend run dev" "npm --prefix frontend start"
scripts.dev:chrome: npm run clean:ports && concurrently --kill-others-on-fail --names BACKEND,FRONTEND,BROWSER "npm --prefix backend run dev" "npm --prefix frontend start" "npm run open:chrome"
scripts.dev:raw: concurrently --kill-others-on-fail --names BACKEND,FRONTEND "npm --prefix backend run dev" "npm --prefix frontend start"
